---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Node version | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| pnpm version | e.g. 10.32.1 |
| Package affected | e.g. web, mobile, @repo/db |

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (logs, related issues, etc.).
